context: Agent must identify multiple SRP violations in a God Class and refactor into focused single-responsibility classes

checklist.name: violations.md uses required format
checklist.description: violations.md contains at least three entries each using the three-line 'SRP violation / Refactor / Validation' format

checklist.name: Authentication concern extracted
checklist.description: A separate file is produced for authentication logic (login, password hashing, JWT generation) — e.g. AuthService.ts

checklist.name: Notification concern extracted
checklist.description: Email-sending logic is not mixed into the same class as persistence logic; a separate notification or mailer class or delegation is present

checklist.name: Persistence concern extracted or isolated
checklist.description: Database queries are not scattered across multiple responsibility classes; they are in a dedicated repository or data-access class

checklist.name: Each extracted class has a single responsibility
checklist.description: No produced class contains methods from more than one of the concerns identified in violations.md
